tool_calls:
set -e
ls -l /data
cat /data/users_v1.json
if command -v jq >/dev/null; then echo JQ; else echo NOJQ; fi

set -e
jq '[.[] | {id: .id, fullName: (.firstName + " " + .lastName), email: .emailAddress, location: .address.city, migrated: true}]' /data/users_v1.json | tee /data/users_v2.json

tool_outputs.commands:
set -e
ls -l /data
cat /data/users_v1.json
if command -v jq >/dev/null; then echo JQ; else echo NOJQ; fi

set -e
jq '[.[] | {id: .id, fullName: (.firstName + " " + .lastName), email: .emailAddress, location: .address.city, migrated: true}]' /data/users_v1.json | tee /data/users_v2.json
